recommendations.title: Flodder
recommendations.overview: A low-class antisocial family ends up in a rich upper-class neighborhood and causes all sorts of trouble.

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.

recommendations.title: The Idle Class
recommendations.overview: At an upper class golf resort, a tramp discovers he's the lookalike of a rich man with a beautiful, unhappy wife.

recommendations.title: Ala Vaikunthapurramuloo
recommendations.overview: After growing up enduring criticism from his father, a young man finds his world shaken upon learning he was switched at birth with a millionaire's son.

recommendations.title: Float
recommendations.overview: A father discovers that his son floats, which makes him different from other kids.  To keep them both safe from the judgement of the world, Dad hides, covers, and grounds him. But when his son's ability becomes public, Dad must decide whether to run

recommendations.title: El mesero
recommendations.overview: A waiter pretends to be an important businessman in order to reach the upper class through his entrepreneurial dreams.

recommendations.title: Borgman
recommendations.overview: An enigmatic vagrant cons himself into the home life of an arrogant upper-class family, turning their lives into a psychological nightmare in the process.

recommendations.title: Six Degrees of Separation
recommendations.overview: The story of a young, gay, black, con artist who, posing as the son of Sidney Poitier, cunningly maneuvers his way into the lives of a white, upper-class New York family.

recommendations.title: Ransom
recommendations.overview: When a rich man's son is kidnapped, he cooperates with the police at first but then tries a unique tactic against the criminals.

recommendations.title: Ilo Ilo
recommendations.overview: During the late 1990s, a busy working-class Singaporean couple hires a Filipino woman as a maid and nanny to their young son.
